name: Liverpool Range Wind Farm
current_developer: Liverpool Range Wind Farm Pty Ltd

timeline.title: NSW modification approval (Oct 2024)
timeline.detail: NSW state planning modification approval Oct 2024.

timeline.title: EPBC approval (March 2025)
timeline.detail: Federal EPBC Act approval granted March 2025.

timeline.title: Central West Orana REZ access right
timeline.detail: Liverpool Range awarded CWO REZ grid access right (EnergyCo).

timeline.title: CIS Tender 4 underwriting — Stage 1 (634 MW)
timeline.detail: Liverpool Range Stage 1 (634 MW) wins CIS Tender 4 underwriting — largest single project in T4. Full approved project = ~1.3 GW. Stage 2 (~700 MW) is wind-alone and now a candidate for the Q2 2026 NSW state LTESA Generation round.

stakeholder_issues.issue: Stage 2 (~700 MW) yet to win underwriting
stakeholder_issues.detail: Stage 1 (634 MW) won CIS T4 in Oct 2025. Stage 2 is wind-alone — a structural disadvantage in the upcoming Q2 2026 NSW Roadmap LTESA Generation tender, which is explicitly hybrid-favoured (battery ≤ gen capacity, min 4hr). Tilt has a strong LTESA track record (Palmer).
